THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS CORRECTED AND ADOPTED: DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MICHELLE BOUDREAU'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED WITH FIVE (5) DAYS LEAVE TO PLEAD. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR # 7855
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-17-2002 - DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION W/O PREJUDICE FILED ON JUN-04-02.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2002 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Off Calendar

To Quash Service Of Summons; P&A; Decl Of Elizabeth Michelle Boudreau
Off Calendar May-09-2002 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey I. Schwarzschild, Esq., GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN, MELBOSTAD, GIBSON & HARRIS (415) 621-5600 appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Elizabeth Michelle Boudreau. Michael Carrillo Hall, Esq. (415) 512-9865 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party John Stromwall.

The tentative ruling was corrected and adopted: Defendant Elizabeth Michelle Boudreau's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is denied with five (5) days leave to plead. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

To Quash Service Of Summons; P&A; Decl Of Elizabeth Michelle Boudreau
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Continued To May-09-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Defendant ELIZABETH MICHELLE BOUDREAU's motion to quash service of summons ordered continued to May 9, 2002. Plaintiff to lodge courtesy copies of opposition papers in Department 301 by 5:00 p.m. Monday, May 6th. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
